scripts.prestart: powershell -Command "Get-Process python, ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; exit 0"
scripts.dev-client: npx concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,TUNNEL -c magenta,cyan,green --kill-others "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run tunnel"
scripts.dev-admin: npx concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c magenta,cyan --kill-others "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
